title: rosa × andegavensis var. oenensis
intro: Rosa × andegavensis var. oenensis, also known as Oenothera andegavensis, is a plant species in the evening primrose family. It is a rare alpine perennial with medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). The medicinal properties of Rosa × andegavensis var. oenensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with conditions such as eczema and arthritis. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions and extracts, which may be beneficial for skin health and inflammation.
